message:
feat(Python): Implement 7 more CPython Python/ modules in Zig

Free-threading support modules (PEP 703):
- bootstrap_hash.zig: SipHash-2-4, FNV-1a, hash secret management
- critical_section.zig: Per-object critical sections with nesting
- index_pool.zig: Thread-safe index allocation with lock-free variant
- brc.zig: Biased reference counting for free-threading
- parking_lot.zig: Wait/wake primitives, futex, semaphore, condvar
- qsbr.zig: Quiescent State Based Reclamation for safe memory free

System utilities:
- dup2.zig: File descriptor duplication with cloexec support

All modules include comprehensive test suites.
